INFO    conformance/gap at /electrical/input_power_w: to reach "standard", add /electrical/input_power_w (from datasheet_pdf, per UL 924)

INFO    conformance/grade-satisfied at /index/conformance_level: conformance grade "core" satisfied
INFO    conformance/level at /index/conformance_level: this record achieves conformance level "core"

OK -- cooper-sure-lites-lpx7sd.ulc: 0 errors, 0 warnings, 12 infos (7 optional findings hidden (enrichment and observations); use --verbose or --json).
